results.name: mathd_algebra_276
results.statement:
theorem mathd_algebra_276:
  fixes a b :: int
  assumes "\<forall> x :: real. 10 * x^2 - x - 24 = (a * x - 8) * (b * x + 3)"
  shows "a* b + b = 12"
results.proof:
theorem mathd_algebra_276:
  fixes a b :: int
  assumes "\<forall> x :: real. 10 * x^2 - x - 24 = (a * x - 8) * (b * x + 3)"
  shows "a* b + b = 12"
proof -
  have h1: "10 * (1::real)^2 - 1 - 24 = (real_of_int a * 1 - 8) * (real_of_int b * 1 + 3)"
    using spec[OF assms, of 1] by simp
  have h2: "10 * (-1::real)^2 - (-1) - 24 = (real_of_int a * (-1) - 8) * (real_of_int b * (-1) + 3)"
    using spec[OF assms, of "-1"] by simp
  have h3: "10 * (2::real)^2 - 2 - 24 = (real_of_int a * 2 - 8) * (real_of_int b * 2 + 3)"
    using spec[OF assms, of 2] by simp
  have e1: "real_of_int (a * b + 3 * a - 8 * b) = 9"
    using h1 by (simp add: algebra_simps)
  have e2: "real_of_int (a * b - 3 * a + 8 * b) = 11"
    using h2 by (simp add: algebra_simps)
  have e3: "real_of_int (4 * (a * b) + 6 * a - 16 * b) = 38"
    using h3 by (simp add: algebra_simps)
  have ie1: "a * b + 3 * a - 8 * b = 9" using e1 by linarith
  have ie2: "a * b - 3 * a + 8 * b = 11" using e2 by linarith
  have ie3: "4 * (a * b) + 6 * a - 16 * b = 38" using e3 by linarith
  have ab: "a * b = 10" using ie1 ie2 ie3 by linarith
  have rel: "3 * a - 8 * b = -1" using ie1 ab by linarith
  have relb: "3 * (a * b) - 8 * b * b = - b" using rel by algebra
  have quad: "8 * b * b - b - 30 = 0" using relb ab by simp
  have factored: "(b - 2) * (8 * b + 15) = 0" using quad by algebra
  have b2: "b = 2"
  proof (rule ccontr)
    assume "b \<noteq> 2"
    hence "b - 2 \<noteq> 0" by simp
    hence "8 * b + 15 = 0" using factored by simp
    thus False by presburger
  qed
  show ?thesis using ab b2 by simp
qed
